examples: While it probably wasn't apparent at the time, much of this work is permeated by a spirit of romantic escapism that the likes of Wordsworth would have readily understood.
For John, books are a form of escapism.
But, as Graham Rye points out, just enough room has been left for escapism.
Hirose says the penchant for creating small, controllable worlds has nothing to do with escapism or isolationism.
